business_question: Which stores contribute the highest percentage of sales within their region?
business_context: Regional directors want to benchmark store performance against regional peers.
sql_answer:
WITH store_sales AS (
    SELECT
        REGION,
        STORE_NAME,
        SUM(NET_UNITS_SOLD) AS SALES
    FROM FACT_SALES s
    JOIN DIM_STORE st
      ON s.STORE_KEY = st.STORE_KEY
    GROUP BY REGION, STORE_NAME
)
SELECT
    REGION,
    STORE_NAME,
    SALES,
    ROUND(
        SALES * 100.0 /
        SUM(SALES) OVER(PARTITION BY REGION),
        2
    ) AS REGIONAL_SHARE_PCT
FROM store_sales;
